SOURCE: 28808263.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (28808263.pdf)
SUMMARY: Diverse experience in Accounting, Credit Union Financial Services, Retail Sales, Customer Service, Telemarketing, Food & Beverage, Construction and Ironworks. Outstanding organizational ability with attention to detail, while balancing multiple projects in fast-paced environments with excellent interpersonal and communication skills.
SKILLS: Analytical and Statistical reporting, Public Speaking, Excellent Interpersonal Skills, Meticulous attention to detail, Excel spreadsheets, Workers' compensation knowledge, Results-oriented, Self-directed, Microsoft Office proficiency, Time management, Strong problem solver, Resourceful, Dedicated team player

SOURCE: 28808263.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Payroll/ Accounting Representative
COMPANY: Company Name City , State
DATES: 11/2008 to 11/2011
DESCRIPTION: ['Assisted in all payroll duties including accounting for employee hours, time off requests, STD, leave of absence.', 'Processed data and transmitted weekly, semi-monthly, and sales payrolls.', 'Managed payroll and time and attendance systems.', 'Enforced policies and procedures related to payroll.', 'Onboarded new employees in the time reporting and payroll systems.', 'Processed rehires, transfers, terminations, garnishments, and withholdings.']

COMPANY: Company Name City , State
DATES: 
DESCRIPTION: ['Provided financial services to members in a sales and service culture.', 'Processed sales referrals and promoted bank products, increasing branch sales.', "Opened new accounts, CD's, and IRA's for members.", 'Completed member consumer loan applications and closed loans from outside the branch.']
